yn-intro: Well, howdy! Let's play a little game. I'll ask you some questions, and all you gotta do is swipe. Swipe left for yes, swipe right for no. Alright darlin', here we go.
yn-q2: Is Friday night made for two-steppin'?
yn-q3: Would you rather ride a horse than drive a truck?
yn-q4: Are cowboy boots the best boots?
yn-q5: Does a slow country ballad beat a pop song every time?
yn-q6: Is sweet tea better than soda?
yn-q7: Would you dance in the kitchen if your song came on right now?
yn-q8: Is a front porch the finest seat in the house?
yn-q9: Do you know all the words to at least one Johnny Cash tune?
yn-q10: Last one now. Are you havin' a good time?
yn-no-1: Aw, alright then. A no it is.
yn-complete: And that's the whole hoedown. You did just fine. Tap the button there to play it all again.
